titleStmt.title: SII 39.265: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 265. (A.R. No. 265 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. BHŪVARAGAHAVA-PERUMĀḶ TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. VIJAYANAGARA: SRIRAṄGADĒVA MAHĀRĀYA, ŚAKA 1504 (1582 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription registers the gift of the village Pirāṇduṟai situated in Kurichchipaṟṟu in Eṭṭuppaṟṟu of Padinēḻu Paṟṟu for performing sacred bath, food offerings burning lamps and maintaining flower garden in the temple of Ādivarāha-perumāḷ by Rāyasam Venkaṭaiyar, son of Kōnamarasaiyaṉ, a servant of Koṇḍama Nāyaka, son of Vaiyappa Krishṇappa Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran cīraṅkadeva mahārāyāḷ piṟitivi Irājya śagābdam 1000 5 100 4
Itaṉmel cellaniṉṟa viṣa varuṣattil tulānāyaṟṟu kriṟtikaiyum vicākanakṣatrattu nāḷ
tirumuṭṭam Ātivarākap perumāḷukku poṉparappi cūnta patineḻupaṟṟil Eṭṭuppaṟṟil kuṟiccippa
ṟṟil pirāntuṟai vaiyyappakiṣṇa ṉāyakkar kumāra koṇṭama nāyakkar vācalil Irukkum konamaracay
yaṉ puttirar Irāyacam veṅkaṭa taārāpūṟuvamāka taraivāttuk kuṭuttapaṭi patineḻupaṟṟu naṭṭavarka
kaḷom pirāntuṟai nāṉkellaikkul nañcai puñcainta Aṣṭapokamum tirumuṭṭam Ātivarāka
p perumāḷukku Apiṣekka kaṭṭaḷaikkum ṉaivettiyattiyattukkum neyiviḷakku tirunantavaṉattukkum Irāya
sam veṅkaṭayar naṭattina taṉma Inta taṉmattai naṭattiṉaper keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvai tāṉam
paṇṇiṉa palaṉ peṟuvar Inta taṉmattukku Akitam paṇṇiṉaper keṅkaik karaiyile kārām pacuvai ko
ṉṟa toṣattile pokak kaṭavarākavum §
Digital edition of SII 39.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
